software-engineering.ogDescription: Enterprise software engineering delivered across four continents — platforms, portals and legacy modernisation for SERCO, Towell International, Viita and more. AI-accelerated delivery, human signed-off. Reply in one business day.
jsonLd: {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [{"@type": "Question", "name": "How fast can you deliver an enterprise platform?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Our benchmark: a government-grade national operations centre in nine months, discovery to production. Typical platform builds run six to twelve months depending on integrations — you'll get a scoped timeline after one conversation, not a guess."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Which technologies do you work with?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Modern web stacks (JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, cloud-native on AWS and Azure) plus the enterprise estates around them — SAP, Oracle, Dynamics, Salesforce. We choose the stack that your team can operate, not the one that's fashionable."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "How is AI used in your engineering delivery?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "In the loop, not in the pitch: AI-assisted analysis for legacy mapping, generated test suites, machine-speed regression and delivery telemetry with risk flags. Every deliverable is human-reviewed and human-signed."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Do you work fixed-price?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Yes — fixed scope, fixed outcome is one of our three engagement models, alongside embedded squads and managed retainers. After one call you get a scoped number, not a menu of mystery rates."}}]}

ai-automation.title: AI & Intelligent Automation Services — Agents, Chatbots, Workflow Automation | EaseHawk
ai-automation.description: AI that runs operations, not slideware: ~80% of a 50+ truck US logistics operation automated; a bilingual EN/AR AI assistant live in Saudi Arabia. LLM engineering, AI agents and workflow automation with evals and guardrails.
ai-automation.ogTitle: AI & Intelligent Automation Services — Agents, Chatbots, Workflow Automation | EaseHawk
ai-automation.ogDescription: AI that runs operations, not slideware: ~80% of a 50+ truck US logistics operation automated; a bilingual EN/AR AI assistant live in Saudi Arabia. LLM engineering, AI agents and workflow automation with evals and guardrails.
jsonLd: {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [{"@type": "Question", "name": "What can actually be automated in my business?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "More than you'd guess, less than vendors promise. We start with the workflows that eat the most hours — dispatch, document handling, coordination, reporting — and automate end-to-end, measuring the hours saved. One client now runs ~80% of daily operations automated; your number depends on your operation, and we'll tell you honestly."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Is our data safe — will it train someone else's model?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Your engagement data stays inside your engagement. We design for data residency and PDPL-class constraints from the start, and governance review is part of the build, not an afterthought."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Should we build or buy AI capability?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Both have a place. Off-the-shelf tools for commodity tasks; custom automation where your workflow IS your edge. The first conversation is exactly this triage — and we'll recommend buying where buying is right."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "How fast until the first automation is live?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Weeks, not quarters, for the first scoped workflow — then automation compounds release after release. Our longest AI engagement is two years and still shipping."}}]}

crm-enterprise.description: CRM your team adopts, not just installs: Salesforce for UK financial services, Dynamics 365 for Saudi industry, Zoho for India's largest volunteer non-profit. Direct Salesforce, Microsoft and Zoho partnerships; SAP and Oracle estate experience.
crm-enterprise.ogTitle: CRM Implementation Partner — Salesforce, Dynamics 365, Zoho, Odoo | EaseHawk Technologies
crm-enterprise.ogDescription: CRM your team adopts, not just installs: Salesforce for UK financial services, Dynamics 365 for Saudi industry, Zoho for India's largest volunteer non-profit. Direct Salesforce, Microsoft and Zoho partnerships; SAP and Oracle estate experience.
jsonLd: {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [{"@type": "Question", "name": "Which CRM is right for us — Salesforce, Dynamics, Zoho or Odoo?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "It depends on your stack, scale and budget — and because we hold direct partnerships with all three majors plus Odoo delivery experience, we have no incentive to force one answer. Tell us your situation; we'll recommend the platform we'd choose in your seat."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "How risky is migrating our data?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Handled properly: not very. We migrate in staged, testable increments with validation gates at every step — records verified at machine speed before cutover day, with rollback paths defined. No weekend big-bangs."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "How do you make sure the team actually adopts it?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Adoption is designed in: workflows configured to how your team really sells, enablement sessions before go-live, and a cutover with zero pipeline disruption. Our UK finance client's Salesforce became the number leadership trusts — that's the bar."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Are you certified partners?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "We hold direct partnerships with Salesforce, Microsoft and Zoho, and have placed senior Dynamics 365 architects on federal government programmes through our channel partners."}}]}

data-bi.description: Dashboards leadership actually opens: a year-long embedded Power BI programme inside a global semiconductor leader, daily revenue visibility for a US fleet operator, and AI-ready data foundations beneath it all.
data-bi.ogTitle: Data & Business Intelligence Services — Power BI, Data Engineering, AI-Ready Platforms | EaseHawk
data-bi.ogDescription: Dashboards leadership actually opens: a year-long embedded Power BI programme inside a global semiconductor leader, daily revenue visibility for a US fleet operator, and AI-ready data foundations beneath it all.
jsonLd: {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [{"@type": "Question", "name": "Our data is a mess — where do we even start?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Where everyone starts: one decision that matters, traced back to the data it needs. We build that path first — model, pipeline, dashboard — then every next report ships faster than the last because the foundations are reusable."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Why Power BI?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Because it's where enterprise reporting lives — and we've run it at semiconductor-fab scale for a full year, embedded. That said, the modelling discipline underneath matters more than the tool; good foundations outlive any BI front-end."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Embedded specialist or project delivery — which fits?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "If you need a reporting estate built, project delivery. If you need the capability inside your team, embedded — our UTAC engagement ran a year with knowledge transfer throughout, so the capability stayed when we left."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "What does 'AI-ready' actually mean?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Modelled, governed, documented data that a language model can query without hallucinating your numbers. It's the difference between AI on top of chaos and AI on top of truth — and it's cheaper to build in now than to retrofit later."}}]}

jsonLd: {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [{"@type": "Question", "name": "How do you use AI in creative work?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "In the pipeline, never on the final frame: AI-assisted research, edit iteration and localisation compress timelines, then human craft signs everything that ships. It's how four market adaptations run in parallel without four parallel budgets."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Can you handle multi-market, multi-language campaigns?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "It's a specialty: four APAC markets for one food brand in a single year, and Arabic-market work across the GCC. Cultural adaptation is treated as strategy, not translation."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Retainer or project — which should we pick?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Steady launch calendar: retainer (our Tigo engagement is three years and counting). One flagship film or a single campaign: project. Both are priced after one scoping call."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "What's a realistic turnaround?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Retained clients get announcement-speed delivery — assets cleared against three brand systems have shipped inside partnership launch windows. One-off projects are scoped honestly upfront; we'd rather lose a rush job than miss a date."}}]}

jsonLd: {"@context": "https://schema.org", "@type": "FAQPage", "mainEntity": [{"@type": "Question", "name": "How fast can a specialist start?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Weeks, not months — matched, vetted and embedded into your tools and standups. Our fastest augmentation had two developers productive inside weeks; senior architect placements on government programmes ran on federal timelines and still landed on schedule."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "How are candidates vetted?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "AI-assisted screening compresses the funnel; humans verify enterprise references and run the technical bar. Every profile we present has already cleared the vetting we'd stake a channel relationship on — because we do, with Protiviti and Alpha Data."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "Can you work through our firm — white-label?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "Yes, it's how our biggest placements run: through consulting and channel partners into their end clients, with your paper and your brand. Channel-friendly is a design principle, not an accommodation."}}, {"@type": "Question", "name": "What if the fit isn't right?", "acceptedAnswer": {"@type": "Answer", "text": "We address it directly and fast — fit conversations early in the engagement, and replacement handled without drama. A placement only counts if it's still delivering in month six; that's the record we protect."}}]}
